You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 23.84 (commit: afd37fc8).

## Issue to Resolve

[Prompts] Regression in Prompts responses list pagination
### Expected behavior
When tapping the `View all responses` and scrolling the response list I should be able to get an infinite scroll with proper pagination until I see all responses. New posts are added to the end of the list when loaded. (it was working on version 23.6 and below)

### Actual behavior
When tapping the `View all responses` and scrolling the response list I see the new responses loading once or twice but then no more posts are loaded. Posts shift places when a load happens. (this behavior started on version 23.7)

### Steps to reproduce the behavior
On any Jetpack app build of version 23.7 or later do the following:
1. Install and log into the Jetpack app
2. Make sure the `dailyprompt-XXXX` tag for the current day IS NOT FOLLOWED
3. Go to the dashboard
4. Tap `View all responses` on the Prompts card
5. Scroll the prompt tag responses list for a while
6. **Verify** pagination is not working properly (posts are shifting around)
7. **Verify** pagination stops loading new posts at some point

##### Tested on Emulator, Android 14, JPAndroid 23.7 and later

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `RELEASE-NOTES.txt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/bloggingprompts/BloggingPromptsPostTagProvider.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.bloggingprompts.promptslist
 2→
 3→import android.content.Context
 4→import android.content.Intent
 5→import android.os.Bundle
 6→import androidx.activity.viewModels
 7→import androidx.compose.runtime.collectAsState
 8→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
 9→import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
10→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
11→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.launchIn
12→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.onEach
13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.LocaleAwareActivity
15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.bloggingprompts.promptslist.compose.BloggingPromptsListScreen
16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.theme.AppTheme
17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostUtils
18→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.setContent
19→
20→@AndroidEntryPoint
21→class BloggingPromptsListActivity : LocaleAwareActivity() {
22→    private val viewModel: BloggingPromptsListViewModel by viewModels()
23→
24→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
25→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
26→        setContent {
27→            AppTheme {
28→                val uiState by viewModel.uiStateFlow.collectAsState()
29→                BloggingPromptsListScreen(
30→                    uiState,
31→                    { onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed() },
32→                    viewModel::onPromptListItemClicked
33→                )
34→            }
35→        }
36→        observeActions()
37→    }
38→
39→    /**
40→     * Since we're declaring that this Activity handles orientation changes by itself in the
41→     * AndroidManifest.xml (android:configChanges="orientation|screenSize") Activity#onResume will not be called
42→     * when the screen orientation changes. This was done on purpose to avoid loading the list of prompts again
43→     * unnecessarily and also to avoid tracking of the screen shown analytics event again while in the same screen.
44→     */
45→    override fun onResume() {
46→        super.onResume()
47→        viewModel.onScreenShown()
48→    }
49→
50→    private fun observeActions() {
51→        viewModel.actionEvents.onEach(this::handleActionEvents).launchIn(lifecycleScope)
52→    }
53→
54→    private fun handleActionEvents(actionEvent: BloggingPromptsListViewModel.ActionEvent) {
55→        when (actionEvent) {
56→            is BloggingPromptsListViewModel.ActionEvent.OpenEditor -> {
57→                startActivity(
58→                    ActivityLauncher.createOpenEditorWithBloggingPromptIntent(
59→                        this, actionEvent.bloggingPromptId, PostUtils.EntryPoint.BLOGGING_PROMPTS_LIST
60→                    )
61→                )
62→            }
63→        }
64→    }
65→
66→    companion object {
67→        @JvmStatic
68→        fun createIntent(context: Context) = Intent(context, BloggingPromptsListActivity::class.java)
69→    }
70→}
71→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.bloggingprompts
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.R
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.avatars.TrainOfAvatarsItem
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.avatars.TrainOfAvatarsItem.AvatarItem
 6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.avatars.TrainOfAvatarsItem.TrailingLabelTextItem
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem.Card.BloggingPromptCard.BloggingPromptCardWithData
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.BloggingPromptCardBuilderParams
 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
11→import javax.inject.Inject
12→
13→class BloggingPromptCardBuilder @Inject constructor() {
14→    fun build(params: BloggingPromptCardBuilderParams) = params.bloggingPrompt?.let {
15→        val trailingLabel = UiStringRes(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_view_answers)
16→
17→        val avatarsTrain = params.bloggingPrompt.respondentsAvatarUrls.map { respondent -> AvatarItem(respondent) }
18→            .toMutableList<TrainOfAvatarsItem>()
19→            .also { list ->
20→                val labelColor = R.color.primary_emphasis_medium_selector
21→                list.add(TrailingLabelTextItem(trailingLabel, labelColor))
22→            }
23→
24→        BloggingPromptCardWithData(
25→            prompt = UiStringText(it.text),
26→            respondents = avatarsTrain,
27→            numberOfAnswers = params.bloggingPrompt.respondentsCount,
28→            isAnswered = params.bloggingPrompt.isAnswered,
29→            promptId = params.bloggingPrompt.id,
30→            tagUrl = params.bloggingPrompt.answeredLink,
31→            attribution = BloggingPromptAttribution.fromPrompt(params.bloggingPrompt),
32→            onShareClick = params.onShareClick,
33→            onAnswerClick = params.onAnswerClick,
34→            onSkipClick = params.onSkipClick,
35→            onViewMoreClick = params.onViewMoreClick,
36→            onViewAnswersClick = params.onViewAnswersClick,
37→            onRemoveClick = params.onRemoveClick,
38→        )
39→    }
40→}

 48→        this.mySiteSourceManager = mySiteSourceManager
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    fun getBuilderParams(bloggingPromptUpdate: MySiteUiState.PartialState.BloggingPromptUpdate?):
 52→            MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.BloggingPromptCardBuilderParams {
 53→        return MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.BloggingPromptCardBuilderParams(
 54→            bloggingPrompt = bloggingPromptUpdate?.promptModel,
 55→            onShareClick = this::onBloggingPromptShareClick,
 56→            onAnswerClick = { id -> onBloggingPromptAnswerClick(id, bloggingPromptUpdate?.promptModel?.attribution) },
 57→            onSkipClick = this::onBloggingPromptSkipClick,
 58→            onViewMoreClick = this::onBloggingPromptViewMoreClick,
 59→            onViewAnswersClick = this::onBloggingPromptViewAnswersClick,
 60→            onRemoveClick = this::onBloggingPromptRemoveClick
 61→        )
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    private fun onBloggingPromptShareClick(message: String) {
 65→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.SharePrompt(message))
 66→    }
 67→
 68→    private fun onBloggingPromptAnswerClick(promptId: Int, attribution: String?) {
 69→        bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker.trackMySiteCardAnswerPromptClicked(attribution)
 70→        val selectedSite = requireNotNull(selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite())
 71→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.AnswerPrompt(selectedSite, promptId))
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    private fun onBloggingPromptSkipClick() {
 75→        selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()?.let { site ->
 76→            val siteId = site.localId().value
 77→
 78→            appPrefsWrapper.setSkippedPromptDay(Date(), siteId)
 79→            mySiteSourceManager.refreshBloggingPrompts(true)
 80→
 81→            val snackbar = SnackbarMessageHolder(
 82→                message = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_skipped_snackbar),
 83→                buttonTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.undo),
 84→                buttonAction = {
 85→                    bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker.trackMySiteCardSkipThisPromptUndoClicked()
 86→                    appPrefsWrapper.setSkippedPromptDay(null, siteId)
 87→                    mySiteSourceManager.refreshBloggingPrompts(true)
 88→                },
 89→                isImportant = true
 90→            )
 91→
 92→            _onSnackbarMessage.value = Event(snackbar)
 93→        }
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private fun onBloggingPromptViewAnswersClick(tagUrl: String) {
 97→        bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker.trackMySiteCardViewAnswersClicked()
 98→        val tag = bloggingPromptsPostTagProvider.promptIdSearchReaderTag(tagUrl)
 99→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewAnswers(tag))
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun onBloggingPromptViewMoreClick() {
103→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewMore)
104→    }
105→
106→    private fun onBloggingPromptRemoveClick() {
107→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
108→            updatePromptsCardEnabled(isEnabled = false).join()
109→            _onNavigation.postValue(
110→                Event(
111→                    BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction
112→                        .CardRemoved(this@BloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice::onBloggingPromptUndoClick)
113→                )
114→            )
115→        }
116→    }
117→
118→    private fun onBloggingPromptUndoClick() {
119→        bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker.trackMySiteCardRemoveFromDashboardUndoClicked()
120→        updatePromptsCardEnabled(true)
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun updatePromptsCardEnabled(isEnabled: Boolean) = scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
124→        selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()?.localId()?.value?.let { siteId ->
125→            bloggingPromptsSettingsHelper.updatePromptsCardEnabled(siteId, isEnabled)
126→            mySiteSourceManager.refreshBloggingPrompts(true)
127→        }
128→    }
129→
130→    fun onDashboardCardsUpdated(
131→        scope: CoroutineScope,
132→        state: MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected?
133→    ) {
134→        bloggingPromptsCardTrackHelper.onDashboardCardsUpdated(scope, state)
135→    }
136→
137→    fun onSiteChanged(siteId: Int?, state: MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected?) {
138→        bloggingPromptsCardTrackHelper.onSiteChanged(siteId, state)
139→    }
140→
141→    fun onResume(state: MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected?) {
142→        bloggingPromptsCardTrackHelper.onResume(state)
143→    }
144→}
145→

10→/**

16→@Reusable

20→) {
21→    fun getResizedImageUrl(imageUrl: String?, width: Int, height: Int, isPrivate: Boolean, isAtomic: Boolean): String? =

26→        width: Int,

29→    ): String? = ReaderUtils.getResizedImageUrl(imageUrl, width, height, siteAccessibilityInfo)
30→

32→        ReaderUtils.getTagFromTagName(tagName, tagType)

45→
46→    fun postAndCommentExists(blogId: Long, postId: Long, commentId: Long): Boolean {
47→        return ReaderUtils.postAndCommentExists(blogId, postId, commentId)

 259→    val state: LiveData<MySiteUiState> =
 260→        selectedSiteRepository.siteSelected.switchMap { siteLocalId ->
 261→            isSiteSelected = true
 262→            quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.onSiteChanged()
 263→            resetShownTrackers()
 264→            val result = MediatorLiveData<SiteIdToState>()
 265→            for (newSource in mySiteSourceManager.build(viewModelScope, siteLocalId)) {
 266→                result.addSource(newSource) { partialState ->
 267→                    if (partialState != null) {
 268→                        result.value = (result.value ?: SiteIdToState(siteLocalId)).update(partialState)
 269→                    }
 270→                }
 271→            }
 272→            // We want to filter out the empty state where we have a site ID but site object is missing.
 273→            // Without this check there is an emission of a NoSites state even if we have the site
 274→            result.filter { it.siteId == null || it.state.site != null }.mapSafe { it.state }
 275→        }
 276→
 277→    val uiModel: LiveData<State> = merge(state, quickLinks) { cards, quickLinks ->
 278→        val nonNullCards = cards ?: return@merge buildNoSiteState(null, null)
 279→        with(nonNullCards) {
 280→            val state = if (site != null) {
 281→                cardsUpdate?.checkAndShowSnackbarError()
 282→                val state = buildSiteSelectedStateAndScroll(
 283→                    site,
 284→                    showSiteIconProgressBar,
 285→                    activeTask,
 286→                    isDomainCreditAvailable,
 287→                    quickStartCategories,
 288→                    backupAvailable,
 289→                    scanAvailable,
 290→                    cardsUpdate,
 291→                    bloggingPromptsUpdate,
 292→                    blazeCardUpdate,
 293→                    quickLinks
 294→                )
 295→                trackCardsAndItemsShownIfNeeded(state)
 296→
 297→                bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onDashboardCardsUpdated(
 298→                    viewModelScope,
 299→                    state as? SiteSelected
 300→                )
 301→                state
 302→            } else {
 303→                buildNoSiteState(currentAvatarUrl, avatarName)
 304→            }
 305→            bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 306→
 307→            dashboardCardPlansUtils.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 308→
 309→            domainTransferCardViewModel.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 310→
 311→            state
 312→        }
 313→    }

 386→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "CyclomaticComplexMethod")
 387→    private fun buildSiteSelectedState(
 388→        site: SiteModel,
 389→        activeTask: QuickStartTask?,

 391→        quickStartCategories: List<QuickStartCategory>,

 411→    private fun buildSiteItemsMenu(
 412→        site: SiteModel,
 413→        activeTask: QuickStartTask?,
 414→        backupAvailable: Boolean,
 415→        scanAvailable: Boolean,
 416→        cardsUpdate: CardsUpdate?
 417→    ): List<MySiteCardAndItem> {
 418→        val infoItem = mySiteInfoItemBuilder.build(
 419→            InfoItemBuilderParams(
 420→                isStaleMessagePresent = cardsUpdate?.showStaleMessage ?: false
 421→            )
 422→        )
 423→        val jetpackFeatureCard = getJetpackFeatureCard()
 424→
 425→        val jetpackSwitchMenu = getJetpackSwitchMenu()
 426→
 427→        val jetpackBadge = buildJetpackBadgeIfEnabled()
 428→
 429→        val siteItems = getSiteItems(site, activeTask, backupAvailable, scanAvailable)
 430→
 431→        val sotw2023Card = sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.buildCard()
 432→
 433→        return mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem>().apply {
 434→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }
 435→            sotw2023Card?.let { add(it) }
 436→            addAll(siteItems)
 437→            jetpackSwitchMenu?.let { add(jetpackSwitchMenu) }
 438→            if (jetpackFeatureCardHelper.shouldShowFeatureCardAtTop())
 439→                jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(0, jetpackFeatureCard) }
 440→            else jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(jetpackFeatureCard) }
 441→            jetpackBadge?.let { add(jetpackBadge) }

 445→    private fun buildDashboardCards(

 462→        val jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams = JetpackInstallFullPluginCardBuilderParams(
 463→            site = site,
 464→            onLearnMoreClick = ::onJetpackInstallFullPluginLearnMoreClick,
 465→            onHideMenuItemClick = ::onJetpackInstallFullPluginHideMenuItemClick,
 466→        )
 467→        val jetpackInstallFullPluginCard = jetpackInstallFullPluginCardBuilder.build(jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams)
 468→
 469→        val cardsResult = cardsBuilder.build(
 470→            DomainRegistrationCardBuilderParams(
 471→                isDomainCreditAvailable = isDomainCreditAvailable,
 472→                domainRegistrationClick = this::domainRegistrationClick
 473→            ),
 474→            QuickStartCardBuilderParams(
 475→                quickStartCategories = quickStartCategories,
 476→                moreMenuClickParams = QuickStartCardBuilderParams.MoreMenuParams(
 477→                    onMoreMenuClick = this::onQuickStartMoreMenuClick,
 478→                    onHideThisMenuItemClick = this::onQuickStartHideThisMenuItemClick
 479→                ),
 480→                onQuickStartTaskTypeItemClick = this::onQuickStartTaskTypeItemClick
 481→            ),
 482→            DashboardCardsBuilderParams(
 483→                showErrorCard = cardsUpdate?.showErrorCard == true,
 484→                onErrorRetryClick = this::onDashboardErrorRetry,
 485→                todaysStatsCardBuilderParams = todaysStatsViewModelSlice.getTodaysStatsBuilderParams(
 486→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is TodaysStatsCardModel } as? TodaysStatsCardModel
 487→                ),
 488→                postCardBuilderParams = postsCardViewModelSlice.getPostsCardBuilderParams(
 489→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is PostsCardModel } as? PostsCardModel
 490→                ),
 491→                bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilderParams = bloganuaryNudgeCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams(),
 492→                bloggingPromptCardBuilderParams = bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams(
 493→                    bloggingPromptUpdate
 494→                ),
 495→                domainTransferCardBuilderParams = domainTransferCardViewModel.buildDomainTransferCardParams(
 496→                    site,
 497→                    uiModel.value as? SiteSelected
 498→                ),
 499→                blazeCardBuilderParams = blazeCardViewModelSlice.getBlazeCardBuilderParams(blazeCardUpdate),
 500→                dashboardCardPlansBuilderParams = DashboardCardPlansBuilderParams(
 501→                    isEligible = dashboardCardPlansUtils.shouldShowCard(site),
 502→                    onClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansClick,
 503→                    onHideMenuItemClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansHideMenuItemClick,
 504→                    onMoreMenuClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansMoreMenuClick
 505→                ),
 506→                pagesCardBuilderParams = pagesCardViewModelSlice.getPagesCardBuilderParams(
 507→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is PagesCardModel } as? PagesCardModel,
 508→                ),
 509→                activityCardBuilderParams = activityLogCardViewModelSlice.getActivityLogCardBuilderParams(
 510→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is ActivityCardModel } as? ActivityCardModel
 511→                ),
 512→            ),
 513→            jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams
 514→        )
 515→
 516→        val personalizeCard = personalizeCardBuilder.build(personalizeCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams())
 517→
 518→        val noCardsMessage = noCardsMessageViewModelSlice.buildNoCardsMessage(cardsResult)
 519→
 520→        return mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem>().apply {
 521→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }
 522→            migrationSuccessCard?.let { add(migrationSuccessCard) }
 523→            jetpackInstallFullPluginCard?.let { add(jetpackInstallFullPluginCard) }
 524→            quickLinks?.let { add(quickLinks) }
 525→            addAll(cardsResult)
 526→            noCardsMessage?.let { add(noCardsMessage) }
 527→            personalizeCard?.let { add(personalizeCard) }
 528→        }.toList()
 529→    }

 641→    private fun isValidQuickStartFocusPosition(quickStartTask: QuickStartTask, position: Int): Boolean {
 642→        return if (position == LIST_INDEX_NO_ACTIVE_QUICK_START_ITEM && isSiteHeaderQuickStartTask(quickStartTask)) {
 643→            true
 644→        } else {
 645→            position >= 0
 646→        }
 647→    }

 649→    private fun isSiteHeaderQuickStartTask(quickStartTask: QuickStartTask): Boolean {
 650→        return when (quickStartTask) {
 651→            QuickStartNewSiteTask.UPDATE_SITE_TITLE,
 652→            QuickStartNewSiteTask.UPLOAD_SITE_ICON,
 653→            quickStartRepository.quickStartType.getTaskFromString(QUICK_START_VIEW_SITE_LABEL) -> true
 654→
 655→            else -> false
 656→        }
 657→    }

253→                }
254→            }
255→            RequestCodes.STORIES_PHOTO_PICKER,
256→            RequestCodes.PHOTO_PICKER -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
257→                viewModel.handleStoriesPhotoPickerResult(data)
258→            }
259→            UCrop.REQUEST_CROP -> {
260→                if (resultCode == UCrop.RESULT_ERROR) {
261→                    AppLog.e(
262→                        AppLog.T.MAIN,
263→                        "Image cropping failed!",
264→                        UCrop.getError(data)
265→                    )
266→                }
267→                viewModel.handleCropResult(UCrop.getOutput(data), resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK)
268→            }
269→            RequestCodes.DOMAIN_REGISTRATION -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
270→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulDomainRegistrationResult(
271→                    data.getStringExtra(DomainRegistrationActivity.RESULT_REGISTERED_DOMAIN_EMAIL)
272→                )
273→            }
274→            RequestCodes.LOGIN_EPILOGUE,
275→            RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE -> {
276→                val isNewSite = requestCode == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE ||
277→                        data.getBooleanExtra(LoginEpilogueActivity.KEY_SITE_CREATED_FROM_LOGIN_EPILOGUE, false)
278→                viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
279→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
280→                    isNewSite = isNewSite
281→                )
282→            }
283→            RequestCodes.SITE_PICKER -> {
284→                if (data.getIntExtra(WPMainActivity.ARG_CREATE_SITE, 0) == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE) {
285→                    viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
286→                        data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
287→                        isNewSite = true
288→                    )
289→                } else {
290→                    viewModel.onSitePicked()
291→                }
292→            }
293→            RequestCodes.EDIT_LANDING_PAGE -> {
294→                viewModel.checkAndStartQuickStart(
295→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
296→                    isNewSite = data.getBooleanExtra(
297→                        EditPostActivity.EXTRA_IS_LANDING_EDITOR_OPENED_FOR_NEW_SITE, false
298→                    )
299→                )
300→            }
301→        }
302→    }

383→    private fun MySiteFragmentBinding.setupObservers() {
384→        viewModel.uiModel.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { uiModel ->
385→            hideRefreshIndicatorIfNeeded()
386→            when (uiModel) {
387→                is State.SiteSelected -> loadData(uiModel)
388→                is State.NoSites -> loadEmptyView(uiModel)
389→            }
390→        }
391→        viewModel.onBasicDialogShown.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { model ->
392→            dialogViewModel.showDialog(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager,
393→                BasicDialogViewModel.BasicDialogModel(
394→                    model.tag,
395→                    getString(model.title),
396→                    getString(model.message),
397→                    getString(model.positiveButtonLabel),
398→                    model.negativeButtonLabel?.let { label -> getString(label) },
399→                    model.cancelButtonLabel?.let { label -> getString(label) }
400→                ))
401→        }
402→        viewModel.onTextInputDialogShown.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { model ->
403→            val inputDialog = TextInputDialogFragment.newInstance(
404→                getString(model.title),
405→                model.initialText,
406→                getString(model.hint),
407→                model.isMultiline,
408→                model.isInputEnabled,
409→                model.callbackId
410→            )
411→            inputDialog.show(childFragmentManager, TextInputDialogFragment.TAG)
412→        }
413→        viewModel.onNavigation.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { handleNavigationAction(it) }
414→        viewModel.onSnackbarMessage.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { showSnackbar(it) }
415→        viewModel.onQuickStartMySitePrompts.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { activeTutorialPrompt ->
416→            val message = quickStartUtils.stylizeQuickStartPrompt(
417→                requireContext(),
418→                activeTutorialPrompt.shortMessagePrompt,
419→                activeTutorialPrompt.iconId
420→            )
421→            showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiString.UiStringText(message)))
422→        }
423→        viewModel.onMediaUpload.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { UploadService.uploadMedia(requireActivity(), it) }
424→        dialogViewModel.onInteraction.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { viewModel.onDialogInteraction(it) }
425→        viewModel.onUploadedItem.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { handleUploadedItem(it) }
426→        viewModel.onOpenJetpackInstallFullPluginOnboarding.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
427→            JetpackFullPluginInstallOnboardingDialogFragment.newInstance().show(
428→                requireActivity().supportFragmentManager,
429→                JetpackFullPluginInstallOnboardingDialogFragment.TAG
430→            )
431→        }
432→
433→        viewModel.refresh.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
434→            viewModel.refresh()
435→        }
436→
437→        viewModel.domainTransferCardRefresh.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
438→            viewModel.refresh()
439→        }
440→
441→        viewModel.onShowJetpackIndividualPluginOverlay.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
442→            WPJetpackIndividualPluginFragment.show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager)
443→        }
444→
445→        viewModel.onScrollTo.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
446→            var quickStartScrollPosition = it
447→            if (quickStartScrollPosition == -1) {
448→                quickStartScrollPosition = 0
449→            }
450→            if (quickStartScrollPosition > 0) recyclerView.scrollToPosition(quickStartScrollPosition)
451→            else appbarMain.setExpanded(true)
452→        }
453→
454→        wpMainActivityViewModel.mySiteDashboardRefreshRequested.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
455→            viewModel.refresh()
456→        }
457→    }

465→    private fun showSnackbar(holder: SnackbarMessageHolder) {
466→        activity?.let { parent ->

468→                SnackbarItem(
469→                    info = SnackbarItem.Info(
470→                        view = parent.findViewById(R.id.coordinator),
471→                        textRes = holder.message,
472→                        duration = holder.duration,
473→                        isImportant = holder.isImportant
474→                    ),
475→                    action = holder.buttonTitle?.let {
476→                        SnackbarItem.Action(
477→                            textRes = holder.buttonTitle,
478→                            clickListener = { holder.buttonAction() }
479→                        )
480→                    },
481→                    dismissCallback = { _, event -> holder.onDismissAction(event) }
482→                )
483→            )
484→        }

543→    private fun MySiteInfoHeaderCardBinding.loadMySiteDetails(siteInfoHeader: SiteInfoHeaderCard) {
544→        siteTitle = siteInfoHeader.title
545→        if (siteInfoHeader.iconState is IconState.Visible) {
546→            mySiteBlavatar.visibility = View.VISIBLE
547→            imageManager.load(mySiteBlavatar, BLAVATAR, siteInfoHeader.iconState.url ?: "")
548→            mySiteIconProgress.visibility = View.GONE
549→            mySiteBlavatar.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onIconClick.click() }
550→        } else if (siteInfoHeader.iconState is IconState.Progress) {
551→            mySiteBlavatar.setOnClickListener(null)
552→            mySiteIconProgress.visibility = View.VISIBLE
553→            mySiteBlavatar.visibility = View.GONE
554→        }
555→        quickStartIconFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showIconFocusPoint)
556→        if (siteInfoHeader.onTitleClick != null) {
557→            siteInfoContainer.title.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onTitleClick.click() }
558→        } else {
559→            siteInfoContainer.title.setOnClickListener(null)
560→        }
561→        siteInfoContainer.title.text = siteInfoHeader.title
562→        quickStartTitleFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showTitleFocusPoint)
563→        quickStartSubTitleFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showSubtitleFocusPoint)
564→        siteInfoContainer.subtitle.text = siteInfoHeader.url
565→        siteInfoContainer.subtitle.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onUrlClick.click() }
566→        switchSite.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onSwitchSiteClick.click() }
567→        siteInfoCard.visibility = View.VISIBLE
568→    }

613→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongMethod")
614→    fun handleNavigationAction(action: SiteNavigationAction) = when (action) {
615→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMeScreen -> ActivityLauncher.viewMeActivityForResult(activity)
616→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSitePicker -> ActivityLauncher.showSitePickerForResult(activity, action.site)
617→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentSite(activity, action.site, true)
618→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMediaPicker ->
619→            mediaPickerLauncher.showSiteIconPicker(this@MySiteFragment, action.site)
620→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCropActivity -> startCropActivity(action.imageUri)
621→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLog -> ActivityLauncher.viewActivityLogList(activity, action.site)
622→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenBackup -> ActivityLauncher.viewBackupList(activity, action.site)
623→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenScan -> ActivityLauncher.viewScan(activity, action.site)
624→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlan -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogPlans(activity, action.site)
625→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPosts -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPosts(requireActivity(), action.site)
626→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPages(requireActivity(), action.site)
627→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenHomepage -> ActivityLauncher.editLandingPageForResult(
628→            this,
629→            action.site,
630→            action.homepageLocalId,
631→            action.isNewSite
632→        )
633→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenAdmin -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogAdmin(activity, action.site)
634→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPeople -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPeople(activity, action.site)
635→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSharing -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSharing(activity, action.site)
636→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSiteSettings -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSettingsForResult(activity, action.site)
637→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenThemes -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogThemes(activity, action.site)
638→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlugins -> ActivityLauncher.viewPluginBrowser(activity, action.site)
639→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMedia -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogMedia(activity, action.site)
640→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMore -> activityNavigator.openUnifiedMySiteMenu(
641→            requireActivity(),
642→            action.quickStartEvent
643→        )
644→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenUnifiedComments -> ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)
645→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStats(activity, action.site)
646→        is SiteNavigationAction.ConnectJetpackForStats ->
647→            ActivityLauncher.viewConnectJetpackForStats(activity, action.site)
648→        is SiteNavigationAction.StartWPComLoginForJetpackStats ->
649→            ActivityLauncher.loginForJetpackStats(this@MySiteFragment)
650→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStories -> ActivityLauncher.viewStories(activity, action.site, action.event)
651→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStory ->
652→            ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryForResult(activity, action.site, action.source)
653→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaIds -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaIdsForResult(
654→            activity,
655→            action.site,
656→            action.source,
657→            action.mediaIds.toLongArray()
658→        )
659→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaUris -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaUrisForResult(
660→            activity,
661→            action.site,
662→            action.source,
663→            action.mediaUris.toTypedArray()
664→        )
665→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomains -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainsDashboardActivity(
666→            activity,
667→            action.site
668→        )
669→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomainRegistration -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
670→            activity,
671→            action.site,
672→            DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.CTA_DOMAIN_CREDIT_REDEMPTION
673→        )
674→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenFreeDomainSearch ->
675→            ActivityLauncher.viewPlanWithFreeDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
676→                this,
677→                action.site,
678→                DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.FREE_DOMAIN_WITH_ANNUAL_PLAN
679→            )
680→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPaidDomainSearch -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
681→            this,
682→            action.site,
683→            DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.DOMAIN_PURCHASE
684→        )
685→
686→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewSite -> SitePickerActivity.addSite(activity, action.hasAccessToken, action.source)
687→        is SiteNavigationAction.ShowQuickStartDialog -> showQuickStartDialog(
688→            action.title,
689→            action.message,
690→            action.positiveButtonLabel,
691→            action.negativeButtonLabel,
692→            action.isNewSite
693→        )
694→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenQuickStartFullScreenDialog -> openQuickStartFullScreenDialog(action)
695→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDraftsPosts ->
696→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.DRAFTS)
697→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenScheduledPosts ->
698→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.SCHEDULED)
699→        // The below navigation is temporary and as such not utilizing the 'action.postId' in order to navigate to the
700→        // 'Edit Post' screen. Instead, it fallbacks to navigating to the 'Posts' screen and targeting a specific tab.
701→        is SiteNavigationAction.EditDraftPost ->
702→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.DRAFTS)
703→        is SiteNavigationAction.EditScheduledPost ->
704→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.SCHEDULED)
705→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStatsInsights ->
706→            ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStatsForTimeframe(requireActivity(), action.site, StatsTimeframe.INSIGHTS)
707→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenExternalUrl ->
708→            ActivityLauncher.openUrlExternal(requireActivity(), action.url)
709→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenJetpackPoweredBottomSheet -> showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()
710→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenJetpackMigrationDeleteWP -> showJetpackMigrationDeleteWP()
711→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenJetpackFeatureOverlay -> showJetpackFeatureOverlay(action.source)
712→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPromoteWithBlazeOverlay -> activityNavigator.openPromoteWithBlaze(
713→            requireActivity(),
714→            action.source,
715→            action.shouldShowBlazeOverlay
716→        )
717→        is SiteNavigationAction.ShowJetpackRemovalStaticPostersView -> {
718→            ActivityLauncher.showJetpackStaticPoster(requireActivity())
719→        }
720→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLogDetail -> ActivityLauncher.viewActivityLogDetailFromDashboardCard(
721→            activity,
722→            action.site,
723→            action.activityId,
724→            action.isRewindable
725→        )
726→        is SiteNavigationAction.TriggerCreatePageFlow -> wpMainActivityViewModel.triggerCreatePageFlow()
727→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPagesDraftsTab -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPagesOfType(
728→            requireActivity(),
729→            action.site,
730→            PageListViewModel.PageListType.DRAFTS
731→        )
732→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPagesScheduledTab -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPagesOfType(
733→            requireActivity(),
734→            action.site,
735→            PageListViewModel.PageListType.SCHEDULED
736→        )
737→
738→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCampaignListingPage -> activityNavigator.navigateToCampaignListingPage(
739→            requireActivity(),
740→            action.campaignListingPageSource
741→        )
742→
743→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCampaignDetailPage -> activityNavigator.navigateToCampaignDetailPage(
744→            requireActivity(),
745→            action.campaignId,
746→            action.campaignDetailPageSource
747→        )
748→
749→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomainTransferPage -> activityNavigator.openDomainTransfer(
750→            requireActivity(), action.url
751→        )
752→
753→        is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction -> handleNavigation(action)
754→
755→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDashboardPersonalization -> activityNavigator.openDashboardPersonalization(
756→            requireActivity()
757→        )
758→
759→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenBloganuaryNudgeOverlay -> {
760→            BloganuaryNudgeLearnMoreOverlayFragment
761→                .newInstance(action.isPromptsEnabled)
762→                .show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, BloganuaryNudgeLearnMoreOverlayFragment.TAG)
763→        }
764→    }

766→    private fun handleNavigation(action: BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction) {
767→        when (action) {
768→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.SharePrompt -> shareMessage(action.message)
769→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.AnswerPrompt -> {
770→                ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(
771→                    activity,
772→                    action.selectedSite,
773→                    false,
774→                    PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_MY_SITE,
775→                    action.promptId,
776→                    PostUtils.EntryPoint.MY_SITE_CARD_ANSWER_PROMPT
777→                )
778→            }
779→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewAnswers -> {
780→                ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderTagPreview(
781→                    activity,
782→                    action.readerTag,
783→                    ReaderTracker.SOURCE_BLOGGING_PROMPTS_VIEW_ANSWERS,
784→                    readerTracker,
785→                )
786→            }
787→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.LearnMore ->
788→                (activity as? BloggingPromptsOnboardingListener)?.onShowBloggingPromptsOnboarding()
789→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.CardRemoved ->
790→                showBloggingPromptCardRemoveConfirmation(action.undoClick)
791→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewMore ->
792→                ActivityLauncher.showBloggingPromptsListActivity(activity)
793→        }
794→    }

796→    private fun showBloggingPromptCardRemoveConfirmation(undoClick: () -> Unit) {
797→        context?.run {
798→            val title = getString(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_removed_snackbar_title)
799→            val subtitle = HtmlCompat.fromHtml(
800→                getString(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_removed_snackbar_subtitle),
801→                HtmlCompat.FROM_HTML_MODE_COMPACT
802→            )
803→            val message = TitleSubtitleSnackbarSpannable.create(this, title, subtitle)
804→
805→            val snackbarContent = SnackbarMessageHolder(

844→            .setOnDismissListener(this)
845→            .setContent(QuickStartFullScreenDialogFragment::class.java, bundle)
846→            .build()
847→            .show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, FullScreenDialogFragment.TAG)

850→    private fun startCropActivity(imageUri: UriWrapper) {
851→        val context = activity ?: return
852→        val options = UCrop.Options()
853→        options.setShowCropGrid(false)
854→        options.setStatusBarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(android.R.attr.statusBarColor))
855→        options.setToolbarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(R.attr.wpColorAppBar))
856→        options.setToolbarWidgetColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorOnSurface))
857→        options.setAllowedGestures(UCropActivity.SCALE, UCropActivity.NONE, UCropActivity.NONE)
858→        options.setHideBottomControls(true)
859→        UCrop.of(imageUri.uri, Uri.fromFile(File(context.cacheDir, "cropped_for_site_icon.jpg")))
860→            .withAspectRatio(1f, 1f)
861→            .withOptions(options)
862→            .start(requireActivity(), this)

884→        quickStartTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.QUICK_START_REQUEST_VIEWED)
885→    }

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.bloggingprompts
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
 4→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.ReaderUtilsWrapper
 6→import javax.inject.Inject
 7→
 8→class BloggingPromptsPostTagProvider @Inject constructor(
 9→    private val readerUtilsWrapper: ReaderUtilsWrapper,
10→) {
11→    fun promptIdTag(
12→        tagUrl: String
13→    ): String = readerUtilsWrapper.getTagFromTagUrl(tagUrl)
14→        .takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
15→        ?: BLOGGING_PROMPT_TAG
16→
17→    fun promptIdSearchReaderTag(
18→        tagUrl: String
19→    ): ReaderTag = readerUtilsWrapper.getTagFromTagName(
20→        promptIdTag(tagUrl),
21→        ReaderTagType.FOLLOWED,
22→    )
23→
24→    companion object {
25→        const val BLOGGING_PROMPT_TAG = "dailyprompt"
26→        const val BLOGANUARY_TAG = "bloganuary"
27→    }
28→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.bloggingprompts.promptslist
 2→
 3→import android.content.Context
 4→import android.content.Intent
 5→import android.os.Bundle
 6→import androidx.activity.viewModels
 7→import androidx.compose.runtime.collectAsState
 8→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
 9→import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
10→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
11→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.launchIn
12→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.onEach
13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.LocaleAwareActivity
15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.bloggingprompts.promptslist.compose.BloggingPromptsListScreen
16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.theme.AppTheme
17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostUtils
18→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.setContent
19→
20→@AndroidEntryPoint
21→class BloggingPromptsListActivity : LocaleAwareActivity() {
22→    private val viewModel: BloggingPromptsListViewModel by viewModels()
23→
24→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
25→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
26→        setContent {
27→            AppTheme {
28→                val uiState by viewModel.uiStateFlow.collectAsState()
29→                BloggingPromptsListScreen(
30→                    uiState,
31→                    { onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed() },
32→                    viewModel::onPromptListItemClicked
33→                )
34→            }
35→        }
36→        observeActions()
37→    }
38→
39→    /**
40→     * Since we're declaring that this Activity handles orientation changes by itself in the
41→     * AndroidManifest.xml (android:configChanges="orientation|screenSize") Activity#onResume will not be called
42→     * when the screen orientation changes. This was done on purpose to avoid loading the list of prompts again
43→     * unnecessarily and also to avoid tracking of the screen shown analytics event again while in the same screen.
44→     */
45→    override fun onResume() {
46→        super.onResume()
47→        viewModel.onScreenShown()
48→    }
49→
50→    private fun observeActions() {
51→        viewModel.actionEvents.onEach(this::handleActionEvents).launchIn(lifecycleScope)
52→    }
53→
54→    private fun handleActionEvents(actionEvent: BloggingPromptsListViewModel.ActionEvent) {
55→        when (actionEvent) {
56→            is BloggingPromptsListViewModel.ActionEvent.OpenEditor -> {
57→                startActivity(
58→                    ActivityLauncher.createOpenEditorWithBloggingPromptIntent(
59→                        this, actionEvent.bloggingPromptId, PostUtils.EntryPoint.BLOGGING_PROMPTS_LIST
60→                    )
61→                )
62→            }
63→        }
64→    }
65→
66→    companion object {
67→        @JvmStatic
68→        fun createIntent(context: Context) = Intent(context, BloggingPromptsListActivity::class.java)
69→    }
70→}
71→

13→class BloggingPromptCardBuilder @Inject constructor() {
14→    fun build(params: BloggingPromptCardBuilderParams) = params.bloggingPrompt?.let {
15→        val trailingLabel = UiStringRes(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_view_answers)
16→
17→        val avatarsTrain = params.bloggingPrompt.respondentsAvatarUrls.map { respondent -> AvatarItem(respondent) }
18→            .toMutableList<TrainOfAvatarsItem>()
19→            .also { list ->
20→                val labelColor = R.color.primary_emphasis_medium_selector
21→                list.add(TrailingLabelTextItem(trailingLabel, labelColor))
22→            }
23→
24→        BloggingPromptCardWithData(
25→            prompt = UiStringText(it.text),
26→            respondents = avatarsTrain,
27→            numberOfAnswers = params.bloggingPrompt.respondentsCount,
28→            isAnswered = params.bloggingPrompt.isAnswered,
29→            promptId = params.bloggingPrompt.id,
30→            tagUrl = params.bloggingPrompt.answeredLink,
31→            attribution = BloggingPromptAttribution.fromPrompt(params.bloggingPrompt),
32→            onShareClick = params.onShareClick,
33→            onAnswerClick = params.onAnswerClick,
34→            onSkipClick = params.onSkipClick,
35→            onViewMoreClick = params.onViewMoreClick,
36→            onViewAnswersClick = params.onViewAnswersClick,
37→            onRemoveClick = params.onRemoveClick,
38→        )
39→    }
40→}

 37→    private val _onSnackbarMessage = MutableLiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>>()
 38→    val onSnackbarMessage = _onSnackbarMessage as LiveData<Event<SnackbarMessageHolder>>
 39→
 40→    private val _onNavigation = MutableLiveData<Event<SiteNavigationAction>>()
 41→    val onNavigation = _onNavigation as LiveData<Event<SiteNavigationAction>>
 42→
 43→    private lateinit var scope: CoroutineScope

 45→
 46→    fun initialize(scope: CoroutineScope, mySiteSourceManager: MySiteSourceManager) {

 48→        this.mySiteSourceManager = mySiteSourceManager
 49→    }
 50→
 51→    fun getBuilderParams(bloggingPromptUpdate: MySiteUiState.PartialState.BloggingPromptUpdate?):
 52→            MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.BloggingPromptCardBuilderParams {
 53→        return MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.BloggingPromptCardBuilderParams(
 54→            bloggingPrompt = bloggingPromptUpdate?.promptModel,
 55→            onShareClick = this::onBloggingPromptShareClick,
 56→            onAnswerClick = { id -> onBloggingPromptAnswerClick(id, bloggingPromptUpdate?.promptModel?.attribution) },
 57→            onSkipClick = this::onBloggingPromptSkipClick,
 58→            onViewMoreClick = this::onBloggingPromptViewMoreClick,
 59→            onViewAnswersClick = this::onBloggingPromptViewAnswersClick,
 60→            onRemoveClick = this::onBloggingPromptRemoveClick
 61→        )
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    private fun onBloggingPromptShareClick(message: String) {
 65→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.SharePrompt(message))
 66→    }
 67→
 68→    private fun onBloggingPromptAnswerClick(promptId: Int, attribution: String?) {
 69→        bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker.trackMySiteCardAnswerPromptClicked(attribution)
 70→        val selectedSite = requireNotNull(selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite())
 71→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.AnswerPrompt(selectedSite, promptId))
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    private fun onBloggingPromptSkipClick() {
 75→        selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()?.let { site ->
 76→            val siteId = site.localId().value
 77→
 78→            appPrefsWrapper.setSkippedPromptDay(Date(), siteId)
 79→            mySiteSourceManager.refreshBloggingPrompts(true)
 80→
 81→            val snackbar = SnackbarMessageHolder(
 82→                message = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_skipped_snackbar),
 83→                buttonTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.undo),
 84→                buttonAction = {
 85→                    bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker.trackMySiteCardSkipThisPromptUndoClicked()
 86→                    appPrefsWrapper.setSkippedPromptDay(null, siteId)
 87→                    mySiteSourceManager.refreshBloggingPrompts(true)
 88→                },
 89→                isImportant = true
 90→            )
 91→
 92→            _onSnackbarMessage.value = Event(snackbar)
 93→        }
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private fun onBloggingPromptViewAnswersClick(tagUrl: String) {

 99→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewAnswers(tag))
100→    }

103→        _onNavigation.value = Event(BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewMore)
104→    }
105→
106→    private fun onBloggingPromptRemoveClick() {
107→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
108→            updatePromptsCardEnabled(isEnabled = false).join()
109→            _onNavigation.postValue(
110→                Event(

112→                        .CardRemoved(this@BloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice::onBloggingPromptUndoClick)
113→                )
114→            )
115→        }
116→    }
117→
118→    private fun onBloggingPromptUndoClick() {
119→        bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker.trackMySiteCardRemoveFromDashboardUndoClicked()
120→        updatePromptsCardEnabled(true)
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun updatePromptsCardEnabled(isEnabled: Boolean) = scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
124→        selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()?.localId()?.value?.let { siteId ->
125→            bloggingPromptsSettingsHelper.updatePromptsCardEnabled(siteId, isEnabled)
126→            mySiteSourceManager.refreshBloggingPrompts(true)
127→        }
128→    }
129→
130→    fun onDashboardCardsUpdated(
131→        scope: CoroutineScope,

133→    ) {

135→    }
136→
137→    fun onSiteChanged(siteId: Int?, state: MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected?) {

139→    }
140→
141→    fun onResume(state: MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected?) {
142→        bloggingPromptsCardTrackHelper.onResume(state)
143→    }
144→}

10→/**

16→@Reusable
17→class ReaderUtilsWrapper @Inject constructor(
18→    private val contextProvider: ContextProvider,
19→    private val tagUpdateClientUtilsProvider: TagUpdateClientUtilsProvider
20→) {
21→    fun getResizedImageUrl(imageUrl: String?, width: Int, height: Int, isPrivate: Boolean, isAtomic: Boolean): String? =
22→        ReaderUtils.getResizedImageUrl(imageUrl, width, height, isPrivate, isAtomic)
23→
24→    fun getResizedImageUrl(
25→        imageUrl: String?,
26→        width: Int,
27→        height: Int,
28→        siteAccessibilityInfo: SiteAccessibilityInfo
29→    ): String? = ReaderUtils.getResizedImageUrl(imageUrl, width, height, siteAccessibilityInfo)
30→
31→    fun getTagFromTagName(tagName: String, tagType: ReaderTagType): ReaderTag =
32→        ReaderUtils.getTagFromTagName(tagName, tagType)
33→
34→    fun getDefaultTagFromDbOrCreateInMemory() =
35→        ReaderUtils.getDefaultTagFromDbOrCreateInMemory(contextProvider.getContext(), tagUpdateClientUtilsProvider)
36→
37→    fun getLongLikeLabelText(numLikes: Int, isLikedByCurrentUser: Boolean): String =
38→        ReaderUtils.getLongLikeLabelText(contextProvider.getContext(), numLikes, isLikedByCurrentUser)
39→
40→    fun isExternalFeed(blogId: Long, feedId: Long): Boolean = ReaderUtils.isExternalFeed(blogId, feedId)
41→
42→    fun getReportPostUrl(blogUrl: String): String = ReaderUtils.getReportPostUrl(blogUrl)
43→
44→    fun getReportUserUrl(blogUrl: String, userId: Long): String = ReaderUtils.getReportUserUrl(blogUrl, userId)
45→
46→    fun postAndCommentExists(blogId: Long, postId: Long, commentId: Long): Boolean {
47→        return ReaderUtils.postAndCommentExists(blogId, postId, commentId)
48→    }
49→

51→
52→    fun commentExists(

 176→    private val _onNavigation = MutableLiveData<Event<SiteNavigationAction>>()
 177→    private val _activeTaskPosition = MutableLiveData<Pair<QuickStartTask, Int>>()
 178→    private val _onOpenJetpackInstallFullPluginOnboarding = SingleLiveEvent<Event<Unit>>()
 179→    private val _onShowJetpackIndividualPluginOverlay = SingleLiveEvent<Event<Unit>>()
 180→
 181→    /* Capture and track the site selected event so we can circumvent refreshing sources on resume
 182→       as they're already built on site select. */
 183→    private var isSiteSelected = false
 184→
 185→    val quickLinks: LiveData<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.QuickLinksItem> = merge(
 186→        quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.uiState,
 187→        quickStartRepository.quickStartMenuStep
 188→    ) { quickLinks, quickStartMenuStep ->
 189→        if (quickLinks != null &&
 190→            quickStartMenuStep != null
 191→        ) {
 192→            return@merge quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.updateToShowMoreFocusPointIfNeeded(quickLinks, quickStartMenuStep)
 193→        }
 194→        return@merge quickLinks
 195→    }
 196→
 197→    val onScrollTo: LiveData<Event<Int>> = merge(
 198→        _activeTaskPosition.distinctUntilChanged(),
 199→        quickStartRepository.activeTask
 200→    ) { pair, activeTask ->
 201→        if (pair != null && activeTask != null && pair.first == activeTask) {
 202→            Event(pair.second)
 203→        } else {
 204→            null
 205→        }
 206→    }
 207→    val onSnackbarMessage = merge(
 208→        _onSnackbarMessage,
 209→        siteStoriesHandler.onSnackbar,
 210→        quickStartRepository.onSnackbar,
 211→        siteItemsViewModelSlice.onSnackbarMessage,
 212→        bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onSnackbarMessage,
 213→        siteInfoHeaderCardViewModelSlice.onSnackbarMessage,
 214→        quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.onSnackbarMessage
 215→    )

 218→    val onTextInputDialogShown = siteInfoHeaderCardViewModelSlice.onTextInputDialogShown
 219→
 220→    val onBasicDialogShown = siteInfoHeaderCardViewModelSlice.onBasicDialogShown
 221→
 222→    val onNavigation = merge(
 223→        _onNavigation,
 224→        siteStoriesHandler.onNavigation,
 225→        blazeCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 226→        pagesCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 227→        domainTransferCardViewModel.onNavigation,
 228→        todaysStatsViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 229→        postsCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 230→        activityLogCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 231→        siteItemsViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 232→        bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 233→        bloganuaryNudgeCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 234→        personalizeCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 235→        siteInfoHeaderCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 236→        quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.navigation,
 237→        sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.onNavigation,
 238→    )
 239→
 240→    val onMediaUpload = siteInfoHeaderCardViewModelSlice.onMediaUpload
 241→    val onUploadedItem = siteIconUploadHandler.onUploadedItem
 242→    val onOpenJetpackInstallFullPluginOnboarding = _onOpenJetpackInstallFullPluginOnboarding as LiveData<Event<Unit>>
 243→    val onShowJetpackIndividualPluginOverlay = _onShowJetpackIndividualPluginOverlay as LiveData<Event<Unit>>
 244→
 245→    val refresh =
 246→        merge(
 247→            blazeCardViewModelSlice.refresh,
 248→            pagesCardViewModelSlice.refresh,
 249→            todaysStatsViewModelSlice.refresh,
 250→            postsCardViewModelSlice.refresh,
 251→            activityLogCardViewModelSlice.refresh,
 252→            bloganuaryNudgeCardViewModelSlice.refresh,
 253→            sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.refresh,
 254→        )
 255→    val domainTransferCardRefresh = domainTransferCardViewModel.refresh
 256→
 257→    private var shouldMarkUpdateSiteTitleTaskComplete = false
 258→
 259→    val state: LiveData<MySiteUiState> =
 260→        selectedSiteRepository.siteSelected.switchMap { siteLocalId ->
 261→            isSiteSelected = true
 262→            quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.onSiteChanged()
 263→            resetShownTrackers()
 264→            val result = MediatorLiveData<SiteIdToState>()
 265→            for (newSource in mySiteSourceManager.build(viewModelScope, siteLocalId)) {
 266→                result.addSource(newSource) { partialState ->
 267→                    if (partialState != null) {
 268→                        result.value = (result.value ?: SiteIdToState(siteLocalId)).update(partialState)
 269→                    }
 270→                }
 271→            }
 272→            // We want to filter out the empty state where we have a site ID but site object is missing.
 273→            // Without this check there is an emission of a NoSites state even if we have the site
 274→            result.filter { it.siteId == null || it.state.site != null }.mapSafe { it.state }
 275→        }
 276→
 277→    val uiModel: LiveData<State> = merge(state, quickLinks) { cards, quickLinks ->
 278→        val nonNullCards = cards ?: return@merge buildNoSiteState(null, null)
 279→        with(nonNullCards) {
 280→            val state = if (site != null) {
 281→                cardsUpdate?.checkAndShowSnackbarError()
 282→                val state = buildSiteSelectedStateAndScroll(
 283→                    site,
 284→                    showSiteIconProgressBar,
 285→                    activeTask,
 286→                    isDomainCreditAvailable,
 287→                    quickStartCategories,
 288→                    backupAvailable,
 289→                    scanAvailable,
 290→                    cardsUpdate,
 291→                    bloggingPromptsUpdate,
 292→                    blazeCardUpdate,
 293→                    quickLinks
 294→                )
 295→                trackCardsAndItemsShownIfNeeded(state)
 296→
 297→                bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onDashboardCardsUpdated(
 298→                    viewModelScope,
 299→                    state as? SiteSelected
 300→                )
 301→                state
 302→            } else {
 303→                buildNoSiteState(currentAvatarUrl, avatarName)
 304→            }
 305→            bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 306→
 307→            dashboardCardPlansUtils.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 308→
 309→            domainTransferCardViewModel.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 310→
 311→            state
 312→        }
 313→    }

 315→    private fun CardsUpdate.checkAndShowSnackbarError() {
 316→        if (showSnackbarError) {

 318→                .postValue(Event(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.my_site_dashboard_update_error))))
 319→        }
 320→    }

 322→    init {
 323→        dispatcher.register(this)
 324→        bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.initialize(viewModelScope, mySiteSourceManager)
 325→        bloganuaryNudgeCardViewModelSlice.initialize(viewModelScope)
 326→        siteInfoHeaderCardViewModelSlice.initialize(viewModelScope)
 327→        quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.initialization(viewModelScope)
 328→        quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.start()
 329→        sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.initialize(viewModelScope)
 330→    }

 332→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
 333→    private fun buildSiteSelectedStateAndScroll(
 334→        site: SiteModel,
 335→        showSiteIconProgressBar: Boolean,
 336→        activeTask: QuickStartTask?,
 337→        isDomainCreditAvailable: Boolean,
 338→        quickStartCategories: List<QuickStartCategory>,
 339→        backupAvailable: Boolean,
 340→        scanAvailable: Boolean,
 341→        cardsUpdate: CardsUpdate?,
 342→        bloggingPromptUpdate: BloggingPromptUpdate?,
 343→        blazeCardUpdate: BlazeCardUpdate?,
 344→        quickLinks: MySiteCardAndItem.Card.QuickLinksItem? = null
 345→    ): SiteSelected {
 346→        val siteItems = buildSiteSelectedState(
 347→            site,
 348→            activeTask,
 349→            isDomainCreditAvailable,
 350→            quickStartCategories,
 351→            backupAvailable,
 352→            scanAvailable,
 353→            cardsUpdate,
 354→            bloggingPromptUpdate,
 355→            blazeCardUpdate,
 356→            quickLinks
 357→        )
 358→
 359→        val siteInfo = siteInfoHeaderCardBuilder.buildSiteInfoCard(
 360→            siteInfoHeaderCardViewModelSlice.getParams(
 361→                site,
 362→                activeTask,
 363→                showSiteIconProgressBar
 364→            )
 365→        )
 366→
 367→        if (activeTask != null) {
 368→            scrollToQuickStartTaskIfNecessary(
 369→                activeTask,
 370→                getPositionOfQuickStartItem(siteItems)
 371→            )
 372→        }
 373→
 374→        return SiteSelected(
 375→            siteInfoHeader = siteInfo,
 376→            dashboardData = siteItems
 377→        )
 378→    }

 380→    private fun getPositionOfQuickStartItem(
 381→        siteItems: List<MySiteCardAndItem>,

 386→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "CyclomaticComplexMethod")
 387→    private fun buildSiteSelectedState(
 388→        site: SiteModel,
 389→        activeTask: QuickStartTask?,
 390→        isDomainCreditAvailable: Boolean,
 391→        quickStartCategories: List<QuickStartCategory>,
 392→        backupAvailable: Boolean,
 393→        scanAvailable: Boolean,
 394→        cardsUpdate: CardsUpdate?,
 395→        bloggingPromptUpdate: BloggingPromptUpdate?,
 396→        blazeCardUpdate: BlazeCardUpdate?,
 397→        quickLinks: MySiteCardAndItem.Card.QuickLinksItem?
 398→    ): List<MySiteCardAndItem> {
 399→        return if (shouldShowDashboard(site)) buildDashboardCards(
 400→            site,
 401→            isDomainCreditAvailable,
 402→            quickStartCategories,
 403→            cardsUpdate,
 404→            bloggingPromptUpdate,
 405→            blazeCardUpdate,
 406→            quickLinks
 407→        )
 408→        else buildSiteItemsMenu(site, activeTask, backupAvailable, scanAvailable, cardsUpdate)
 409→    }
 410→
 411→    private fun buildSiteItemsMenu(
 412→        site: SiteModel,
 413→        activeTask: QuickStartTask?,
 414→        backupAvailable: Boolean,
 415→        scanAvailable: Boolean,
 416→        cardsUpdate: CardsUpdate?
 417→    ): List<MySiteCardAndItem> {
 418→        val infoItem = mySiteInfoItemBuilder.build(
 419→            InfoItemBuilderParams(
 420→                isStaleMessagePresent = cardsUpdate?.showStaleMessage ?: false
 421→            )
 422→        )
 423→        val jetpackFeatureCard = getJetpackFeatureCard()
 424→
 425→        val jetpackSwitchMenu = getJetpackSwitchMenu()
 426→
 427→        val jetpackBadge = buildJetpackBadgeIfEnabled()
 428→
 429→        val siteItems = getSiteItems(site, activeTask, backupAvailable, scanAvailable)
 430→
 431→        val sotw2023Card = sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.buildCard()
 432→
 433→        return mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem>().apply {
 434→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }
 435→            sotw2023Card?.let { add(it) }
 436→            addAll(siteItems)
 437→            jetpackSwitchMenu?.let { add(jetpackSwitchMenu) }
 438→            if (jetpackFeatureCardHelper.shouldShowFeatureCardAtTop())
 439→                jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(0, jetpackFeatureCard) }
 440→            else jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(jetpackFeatureCard) }
 441→            jetpackBadge?.let { add(jetpackBadge) }
 442→        }.toList()
 443→    }
 444→
 445→    private fun buildDashboardCards(
 446→        site: SiteModel,
 447→        isDomainCreditAvailable: Boolean,
 448→        quickStartCategories: List<QuickStartCategory>,
 449→        cardsUpdate: CardsUpdate?,
 450→        bloggingPromptUpdate: BloggingPromptUpdate?,
 451→        blazeCardUpdate: BlazeCardUpdate?,
 452→        quickLinks: MySiteCardAndItem.Card.QuickLinksItem?
 453→    ): List<MySiteCardAndItem> {
 454→        val infoItem = mySiteInfoItemBuilder.build(
 455→            InfoItemBuilderParams(
 456→                isStaleMessagePresent = cardsUpdate?.showStaleMessage ?: false
 457→            )
 458→        )
 459→
 460→        val migrationSuccessCard = getJetpackMigrationSuccessCard()
 461→
 462→        val jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams = JetpackInstallFullPluginCardBuilderParams(
 463→            site = site,
 464→            onLearnMoreClick = ::onJetpackInstallFullPluginLearnMoreClick,
 465→            onHideMenuItemClick = ::onJetpackInstallFullPluginHideMenuItemClick,
 466→        )
 467→        val jetpackInstallFullPluginCard = jetpackInstallFullPluginCardBuilder.build(jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams)
 468→
 469→        val cardsResult = cardsBuilder.build(
 470→            DomainRegistrationCardBuilderParams(
 471→                isDomainCreditAvailable = isDomainCreditAvailable,
 472→                domainRegistrationClick = this::domainRegistrationClick
 473→            ),
 474→            QuickStartCardBuilderParams(
 475→                quickStartCategories = quickStartCategories,
 476→                moreMenuClickParams = QuickStartCardBuilderParams.MoreMenuParams(
 477→                    onMoreMenuClick = this::onQuickStartMoreMenuClick,
 478→                    onHideThisMenuItemClick = this::onQuickStartHideThisMenuItemClick
 479→                ),
 480→                onQuickStartTaskTypeItemClick = this::onQuickStartTaskTypeItemClick
 481→            ),
 482→            DashboardCardsBuilderParams(
 483→                showErrorCard = cardsUpdate?.showErrorCard == true,
 484→                onErrorRetryClick = this::onDashboardErrorRetry,
 485→                todaysStatsCardBuilderParams = todaysStatsViewModelSlice.getTodaysStatsBuilderParams(
 486→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is TodaysStatsCardModel } as? TodaysStatsCardModel
 487→                ),
 488→                postCardBuilderParams = postsCardViewModelSlice.getPostsCardBuilderParams(
 489→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is PostsCardModel } as? PostsCardModel
 490→                ),
 491→                bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilderParams = bloganuaryNudgeCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams(),
 492→                bloggingPromptCardBuilderParams = bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams(
 493→                    bloggingPromptUpdate
 494→                ),
 495→                domainTransferCardBuilderParams = domainTransferCardViewModel.buildDomainTransferCardParams(
 496→                    site,
 497→                    uiModel.value as? SiteSelected
 498→                ),
 499→                blazeCardBuilderParams = blazeCardViewModelSlice.getBlazeCardBuilderParams(blazeCardUpdate),
 500→                dashboardCardPlansBuilderParams = DashboardCardPlansBuilderParams(
 501→                    isEligible = dashboardCardPlansUtils.shouldShowCard(site),
 502→                    onClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansClick,
 503→                    onHideMenuItemClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansHideMenuItemClick,
 504→                    onMoreMenuClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansMoreMenuClick
 505→                ),
 506→                pagesCardBuilderParams = pagesCardViewModelSlice.getPagesCardBuilderParams(
 507→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is PagesCardModel } as? PagesCardModel,
 508→                ),
 509→                activityCardBuilderParams = activityLogCardViewModelSlice.getActivityLogCardBuilderParams(
 510→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is ActivityCardModel } as? ActivityCardModel
 511→                ),
 512→            ),
 513→            jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams
 514→        )
 515→
 516→        val personalizeCard = personalizeCardBuilder.build(personalizeCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams())
 517→
 518→        val noCardsMessage = noCardsMessageViewModelSlice.buildNoCardsMessage(cardsResult)
 519→
 520→        return mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem>().apply {
 521→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }
 522→            migrationSuccessCard?.let { add(migrationSuccessCard) }
 523→            jetpackInstallFullPluginCard?.let { add(jetpackInstallFullPluginCard) }
 524→            quickLinks?.let { add(quickLinks) }
 525→            addAll(cardsResult)
 526→            noCardsMessage?.let { add(noCardsMessage) }
 527→            personalizeCard?.let { add(personalizeCard) }
 528→        }.toList()
 529→    }

 553→    private fun getJetpackMigrationSuccessCard(): SingleActionCard? {
 554→        val isJetpackApp = buildConfigWrapper.isJetpackApp
 555→        val isMigrationCompleted = appPrefsWrapper.isJetpackMigrationCompleted()
 556→        val isWordPressInstalled = appStatus.isAppInstalled(wordPressPublicData.currentPackageId())
 557→        if (isJetpackApp && isMigrationCompleted && isWordPressInstalled) {
 558→            return SingleActionCard(
 559→                textResource = R.string.jp_migration_success_card_message,
 560→                imageResource = R.drawable.ic_wordpress_jetpack_appicon,
 561→                onActionClick = ::onPleaseDeleteWordPressAppCardClick
 562→            )
 563→        }
 564→        return null
 565→    }

 585→            onMoreMenuClick = ListItemInteraction.create(this::onJetpackFeatureCardMoreMenuClick),
 586→            learnMoreUrl = jetpackFeatureCardHelper.getLearnMoreUrl()

 614→    private fun buildNoSiteState(accountUrl: String?, accountName: String?): NoSites {
 615→        // Hide actionable empty view image when screen height is under specified min height.
 616→        val shouldShowImage = !buildConfigWrapper.isJetpackApp &&
 617→                displayUtilsWrapper.getWindowPixelHeight() >= MIN_DISPLAY_PX_HEIGHT_NO_SITE_IMAGE
 618→
 619→        val shouldShowAccountSettings = jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldRemoveJetpackFeatures()
 620→        return NoSites(
 621→            shouldShowImage = shouldShowImage,
 622→            avatarUrl = accountUrl,
 623→            accountName = accountName,
 624→            shouldShowAccountSettings = shouldShowAccountSettings
 625→        )
 626→    }
 627→
 628→    private fun scrollToQuickStartTaskIfNecessary(
 629→        quickStartTask: QuickStartTask,
 630→        position: Int
 631→    ) {
 632→        if (_activeTaskPosition.value?.first != quickStartTask && isValidQuickStartFocusPosition(
 633→                quickStartTask,
 634→                position
 635→            )
 636→        ) {
 637→            _activeTaskPosition.postValue(quickStartTask to position)
 638→        }
 639→    }
 640→
 641→    private fun isValidQuickStartFocusPosition(quickStartTask: QuickStartTask, position: Int): Boolean {
 642→        return if (position == LIST_INDEX_NO_ACTIVE_QUICK_START_ITEM && isSiteHeaderQuickStartTask(quickStartTask)) {
 643→            true
 644→        } else {
 645→            position >= 0
 646→        }
 647→    }
 648→

216→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION", "OVERRIDE_DEPRECATION", "ReturnCount", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod")
217→    override fun onActivityResult(requestCode: Int, resultCode: Int, data: Intent?) {
218→        super.onActivityResult(requestCode, resultCode, data)
219→        if (data == null) {
220→            return
221→        }
222→        when (requestCode) {
223→            RequestCodes.DO_LOGIN -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
224→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulLoginResult()
225→            }
226→            RequestCodes.SITE_ICON_PICKER -> {
227→                if (resultCode != Activity.RESULT_OK) {
228→                    return
229→                }
230→                when {
231→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID) -> {
232→                        val mediaId = data.getLongExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID, 0)
233→                        viewModel.handleSelectedSiteIcon(mediaId)
234→                    }
235→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS) -> {
236→                        val mediaUriStringsArray = data.getStringArrayExtra(
237→                            MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS
238→                        ) ?: return
239→
240→                        val source =
241→                            org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.PhotoPickerActivity.PhotoPickerMediaSource.fromString(
242→                                data.getStringExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_SOURCE)
243→                            )
244→                        val iconUrl = mediaUriStringsArray.getOrNull(0) ?: return
245→                        viewModel.handleTakenSiteIcon(iconUrl, source)
246→                    }
247→                    else -> {
248→                        AppLog.e(
249→                            AppLog.T.UTILS,
250→                            "Can't resolve picked or captured image"
251→                        )
252→                    }
253→                }
254→            }
255→            RequestCodes.STORIES_PHOTO_PICKER,
256→            RequestCodes.PHOTO_PICKER -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
257→                viewModel.handleStoriesPhotoPickerResult(data)
258→            }
259→            UCrop.REQUEST_CROP -> {
260→                if (resultCode == UCrop.RESULT_ERROR) {
261→                    AppLog.e(
262→                        AppLog.T.MAIN,
263→                        "Image cropping failed!",
264→                        UCrop.getError(data)
265→                    )
266→                }
267→                viewModel.handleCropResult(UCrop.getOutput(data), resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK)
268→            }
269→            RequestCodes.DOMAIN_REGISTRATION -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
270→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulDomainRegistrationResult(
271→                    data.getStringExtra(DomainRegistrationActivity.RESULT_REGISTERED_DOMAIN_EMAIL)
272→                )
273→            }
274→            RequestCodes.LOGIN_EPILOGUE,
275→            RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE -> {
276→                val isNewSite = requestCode == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE ||
277→                        data.getBooleanExtra(LoginEpilogueActivity.KEY_SITE_CREATED_FROM_LOGIN_EPILOGUE, false)
278→                viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
279→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
280→                    isNewSite = isNewSite
281→                )
282→            }
283→            RequestCodes.SITE_PICKER -> {
284→                if (data.getIntExtra(WPMainActivity.ARG_CREATE_SITE, 0) == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE) {
285→                    viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
286→                        data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
287→                        isNewSite = true
288→                    )
289→                } else {
290→                    viewModel.onSitePicked()
291→                }
292→            }
293→            RequestCodes.EDIT_LANDING_PAGE -> {
294→                viewModel.checkAndStartQuickStart(
295→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
296→                    isNewSite = data.getBooleanExtra(
297→                        EditPostActivity.EXTRA_IS_LANDING_EDITOR_OPENED_FOR_NEW_SITE, false
298→                    )
299→                )
300→            }
301→        }
302→    }
