321→    private fun MySiteFragmentBinding.setupContentViews(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
322→        val layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(activity)
323→
324→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
325→            savedInstanceState?.getParcelable(KEY_LIST_STATE, Parcelable::class.java)?.let {
326→                layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(it)
327→            }
328→        } else {
329→            @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
330→            savedInstanceState?.getParcelable<Parcelable>(KEY_LIST_STATE)?.let {
331→                layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(it)
332→            }
333→        }
334→
335→        recyclerView.layoutManager = layoutManager
336→        recyclerView.addItemDecoration(
337→            MySiteCardAndItemDecoration(
338→                horizontalMargin = resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_extra_large),
339→                verticalMargin = resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
340→            )
341→        )
342→
343→        val adapter = MySiteAdapter(
344→            imageManager,
345→            uiHelpers,
346→            accountStore,
347→            meGravatarLoader,
348→            bloggingPromptsCardAnalyticsTracker,
349→            htmlCompatWrapper
350→        ) { viewModel.onBloggingPromptsLearnMoreClicked() }
351→
352→        adapter.registerAdapterDataObserver(object : RecyclerView.AdapterDataObserver() {
353→            override fun onItemRangeInserted(positionStart: Int, itemCount: Int) {
354→                super.onItemRangeInserted(positionStart, itemCount)
355→                if (positionStart == FIRST_ITEM) {
356→                    recyclerView.smoothScrollToPosition(0)
357→                }
358→            }
359→        })
360→
361→        savedInstanceState?.getBundle(KEY_NESTED_LISTS_STATES)?.let {
362→            adapter.onRestoreInstanceState(it)
363→        }
364→
365→        recyclerView.adapter = adapter
366→
367→        swipeToRefreshHelper = WPSwipeToRefreshHelper.buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(swipeRefreshLayout) {
368→            if (NetworkUtils.checkConnection(requireActivity())) {
369→                viewModel.refresh(isPullToRefresh = true)
370→            } else {
371→                swipeToRefreshHelper.isRefreshing = false
372→            }
373→        }
374→
375→        setupActionableEmptyView()
376→    }

382→    @Suppress("LongMethod")
383→    private fun MySiteFragmentBinding.setupObservers() {
384→        viewModel.uiModel.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) { uiModel ->
385→            hideRefreshIndicatorIfNeeded()
386→            when (uiModel) {
387→                is State.SiteSelected -> loadData(uiModel)
388→                is State.NoSites -> loadEmptyView(uiModel)
389→            }
390→        }
391→        viewModel.onBasicDialogShown.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { model ->
392→            dialogViewModel.showDialog(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager,
393→                BasicDialogViewModel.BasicDialogModel(
394→                    model.tag,
395→                    getString(model.title),
396→                    getString(model.message),
397→                    getString(model.positiveButtonLabel),
398→                    model.negativeButtonLabel?.let { label -> getString(label) },
399→                    model.cancelButtonLabel?.let { label -> getString(label) }
400→                ))
401→        }
402→        viewModel.onTextInputDialogShown.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { model ->
403→            val inputDialog = TextInputDialogFragment.newInstance(
404→                getString(model.title),
405→                model.initialText,
406→                getString(model.hint),
407→                model.isMultiline,
408→                model.isInputEnabled,
409→                model.callbackId
410→            )
411→            inputDialog.show(childFragmentManager, TextInputDialogFragment.TAG)
412→        }
413→        viewModel.onNavigation.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { handleNavigationAction(it) }
414→        viewModel.onSnackbarMessage.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { showSnackbar(it) }
415→        viewModel.onQuickStartMySitePrompts.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { activeTutorialPrompt ->
416→            val message = quickStartUtils.stylizeQuickStartPrompt(
417→                requireContext(),
418→                activeTutorialPrompt.shortMessagePrompt,
419→                activeTutorialPrompt.iconId
420→            )
421→            showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiString.UiStringText(message)))
422→        }
423→        viewModel.onMediaUpload.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { UploadService.uploadMedia(requireActivity(), it) }
424→        dialogViewModel.onInteraction.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { viewModel.onDialogInteraction(it) }
425→        viewModel.onUploadedItem.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { handleUploadedItem(it) }
426→        viewModel.onOpenJetpackInstallFullPluginOnboarding.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
427→            JetpackFullPluginInstallOnboardingDialogFragment.newInstance().show(
428→                requireActivity().supportFragmentManager,
429→                JetpackFullPluginInstallOnboardingDialogFragment.TAG
430→            )
431→        }
432→
433→        viewModel.refresh.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
434→            viewModel.refresh()
435→        }
436→
437→        viewModel.domainTransferCardRefresh.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
438→            viewModel.refresh()
439→        }
440→
441→        viewModel.onShowJetpackIndividualPluginOverlay.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
442→            WPJetpackIndividualPluginFragment.show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager)
443→        }
444→
445→        viewModel.onScrollTo.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
446→            var quickStartScrollPosition = it
447→            if (quickStartScrollPosition == -1) {
448→                quickStartScrollPosition = 0
449→            }
450→            if (quickStartScrollPosition > 0) recyclerView.scrollToPosition(quickStartScrollPosition)
451→            else appbarMain.setExpanded(true)
452→        }
453→
454→        wpMainActivityViewModel.mySiteDashboardRefreshRequested.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
455→            viewModel.refresh()
456→        }
457→    }

465→    private fun showSnackbar(holder: SnackbarMessageHolder) {
466→        activity?.let { parent ->
467→            snackbarSequencer.enqueue(
468→                SnackbarItem(
469→                    info = SnackbarItem.Info(
470→                        view = parent.findViewById(R.id.coordinator),
471→                        textRes = holder.message,
472→                        duration = holder.duration,
473→                        isImportant = holder.isImportant
474→                    ),
475→                    action = holder.buttonTitle?.let {
476→                        SnackbarItem.Action(
477→                            textRes = holder.buttonTitle,
478→                            clickListener = { holder.buttonAction() }
479→                        )
480→                    },
481→                    dismissCallback = { _, event -> holder.onDismissAction(event) }
482→                )
483→            )
484→        }
485→    }

543→    private fun MySiteInfoHeaderCardBinding.loadMySiteDetails(siteInfoHeader: SiteInfoHeaderCard) {
544→        siteTitle = siteInfoHeader.title
545→        if (siteInfoHeader.iconState is IconState.Visible) {
546→            mySiteBlavatar.visibility = View.VISIBLE
547→            imageManager.load(mySiteBlavatar, BLAVATAR, siteInfoHeader.iconState.url ?: "")
548→            mySiteIconProgress.visibility = View.GONE
549→            mySiteBlavatar.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onIconClick.click() }
550→        } else if (siteInfoHeader.iconState is IconState.Progress) {
551→            mySiteBlavatar.setOnClickListener(null)
552→            mySiteIconProgress.visibility = View.VISIBLE
553→            mySiteBlavatar.visibility = View.GONE
554→        }
555→        quickStartIconFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showIconFocusPoint)
556→        if (siteInfoHeader.onTitleClick != null) {
557→            siteInfoContainer.title.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onTitleClick.click() }
558→        } else {
559→            siteInfoContainer.title.setOnClickListener(null)
560→        }
561→        siteInfoContainer.title.text = siteInfoHeader.title
562→        quickStartTitleFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showTitleFocusPoint)
563→        quickStartSubTitleFocusPoint.setVisibleOrGone(siteInfoHeader.showSubtitleFocusPoint)
564→        siteInfoContainer.subtitle.text = siteInfoHeader.url
565→        siteInfoContainer.subtitle.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onUrlClick.click() }
566→        switchSite.setOnClickListener { siteInfoHeader.onSwitchSiteClick.click() }
567→        siteInfoCard.visibility = View.VISIBLE
568→    }

589→            if (state.accountName.isNullOrEmpty()) {

591→            } else {
592→                noSitesView.meDisplayName.visibility = View.VISIBLE
593→            }
594→            loadGravatar(state.avatarUrl)
595→            noSitesView.avatarAccountSettings.setOnClickListener { viewModel.onAvatarPressed() }

613→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongMethod")
614→    fun handleNavigationAction(action: SiteNavigationAction) = when (action) {
615→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMeScreen -> ActivityLauncher.viewMeActivityForResult(activity)
616→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSitePicker -> ActivityLauncher.showSitePickerForResult(activity, action.site)
617→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentSite(activity, action.site, true)
618→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMediaPicker ->
619→            mediaPickerLauncher.showSiteIconPicker(this@MySiteFragment, action.site)
620→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCropActivity -> startCropActivity(action.imageUri)
621→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLog -> ActivityLauncher.viewActivityLogList(activity, action.site)
622→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenBackup -> ActivityLauncher.viewBackupList(activity, action.site)
623→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenScan -> ActivityLauncher.viewScan(activity, action.site)
624→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlan -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogPlans(activity, action.site)
625→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPosts -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPosts(requireActivity(), action.site)
626→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPages(requireActivity(), action.site)
627→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenHomepage -> ActivityLauncher.editLandingPageForResult(
628→            this,
629→            action.site,
630→            action.homepageLocalId,
631→            action.isNewSite
632→        )
633→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenAdmin -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogAdmin(activity, action.site)
634→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPeople -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPeople(activity, action.site)
635→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSharing -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSharing(activity, action.site)
636→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSiteSettings -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSettingsForResult(activity, action.site)
637→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenThemes -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogThemes(activity, action.site)
638→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlugins -> ActivityLauncher.viewPluginBrowser(activity, action.site)
639→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMedia -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogMedia(activity, action.site)
640→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMore -> activityNavigator.openUnifiedMySiteMenu(
641→            requireActivity(),
642→            action.quickStartEvent
643→        )
644→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenUnifiedComments -> ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)
645→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStats(activity, action.site)
646→        is SiteNavigationAction.ConnectJetpackForStats ->
647→            ActivityLauncher.viewConnectJetpackForStats(activity, action.site)
648→        is SiteNavigationAction.StartWPComLoginForJetpackStats ->
649→            ActivityLauncher.loginForJetpackStats(this@MySiteFragment)
650→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStories -> ActivityLauncher.viewStories(activity, action.site, action.event)
651→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStory ->
652→            ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryForResult(activity, action.site, action.source)
653→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaIds -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaIdsForResult(
654→            activity,
655→            action.site,
656→            action.source,
657→            action.mediaIds.toLongArray()
658→        )
659→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaUris -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaUrisForResult(
660→            activity,
661→            action.site,
662→            action.source,
663→            action.mediaUris.toTypedArray()
664→        )
665→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomains -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainsDashboardActivity(
666→            activity,
667→            action.site
668→        )
669→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomainRegistration -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
670→            activity,
671→            action.site,
672→            DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.CTA_DOMAIN_CREDIT_REDEMPTION
673→        )
674→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenFreeDomainSearch ->
675→            ActivityLauncher.viewPlanWithFreeDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
676→                this,
677→                action.site,
678→                DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.FREE_DOMAIN_WITH_ANNUAL_PLAN
679→            )
680→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPaidDomainSearch -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
681→            this,
682→            action.site,
683→            DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.DOMAIN_PURCHASE
684→        )
685→
686→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewSite -> SitePickerActivity.addSite(activity, action.hasAccessToken, action.source)
687→        is SiteNavigationAction.ShowQuickStartDialog -> showQuickStartDialog(
688→            action.title,
689→            action.message,
690→            action.positiveButtonLabel,
691→            action.negativeButtonLabel,
692→            action.isNewSite
693→        )
694→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenQuickStartFullScreenDialog -> openQuickStartFullScreenDialog(action)
695→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDraftsPosts ->
696→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.DRAFTS)

766→    private fun handleNavigation(action: BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction) {
767→        when (action) {
768→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.SharePrompt -> shareMessage(action.message)
769→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.AnswerPrompt -> {
770→                ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(
771→                    activity,
772→                    action.selectedSite,
773→                    false,
774→                    PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_MY_SITE,
775→                    action.promptId,
776→                    PostUtils.EntryPoint.MY_SITE_CARD_ANSWER_PROMPT
777→                )
778→            }
779→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewAnswers -> {
780→                ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderTagPreview(
781→                    activity,
782→                    action.readerTag,
783→                    ReaderTracker.SOURCE_BLOGGING_PROMPTS_VIEW_ANSWERS,
784→                    readerTracker,
785→                )
786→            }
787→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.LearnMore ->
788→                (activity as? BloggingPromptsOnboardingListener)?.onShowBloggingPromptsOnboarding()
789→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.CardRemoved ->
790→                showBloggingPromptCardRemoveConfirmation(action.undoClick)
791→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewMore ->
792→                ActivityLauncher.showBloggingPromptsListActivity(activity)
793→        }
794→    }

850→    private fun startCropActivity(imageUri: UriWrapper) {
851→        val context = activity ?: return
852→        val options = UCrop.Options()
853→        options.setShowCropGrid(false)
854→        options.setStatusBarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(android.R.attr.statusBarColor))
855→        options.setToolbarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(R.attr.wpColorAppBar))
856→        options.setToolbarWidgetColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorOnSurface))
857→        options.setAllowedGestures(UCropActivity.SCALE, UCropActivity.NONE, UCropActivity.NONE)
858→        options.setHideBottomControls(true)
859→        UCrop.of(imageUri.uri, Uri.fromFile(File(context.cacheDir, "cropped_for_site_icon.jpg")))
860→            .withAspectRatio(1f, 1f)
861→            .withOptions(options)
862→            .start(requireActivity(), this)
863→    }
